name: Mrs Fields Nutty White Chunk Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups White Chocolate Bar (8 oz), coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, soda and salt. Mix well and set aside.
3. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, blend sugars at medium speed.
4. Add butter and mix until forming a grainy paste, scraping down the sides of the bowl.
5. Add eggs and vanilla and beat at medium speed until light and fluffy.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture, pecans and white chocolate to the dough on low speed until just combined.
7. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets, 2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 20-22 minutes or until edges just begin to turn golden brown.
9. Transfer cookies to a cool flat surface.
